description_long: This is a three-story brick pizzeria building with a flat, dark roof and classic urban facade. The ground floor features a large entrance, possibly a garage-style door, and a red mailbox or newspaper stand near the front. The upper floors have evenly spaced windows with decorative lintels, and the building is surrounded by a sidewalk and various urban elements such as street lamps, a trash bin, a fence, and a bus stop shelter. Outdoor seating with tables and chairs is visible on one side, suggesting a welcoming area for customers. The color palette is dominated by dark blues, grays, and brick tones, giving the building a sturdy, slightly industrial appearance. The overall scene includes several street-level details, enhancing its realism and situating it firmly in an urban context.
description: A three-story brick pizzeria with classic urban features, outdoor seating, and surrounding street elements like lamps and a bus stop. The building has a dark roof, decorative windows, and a welcoming sidewalk area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, street lamps, bus stop shelter, and various street furniture lined up in front of the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, window arrangement, and the presence of a red mailbox or newspaper stand near the corner.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the outdoor seating area with tables and chairs, as well as the back and side details of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's side facade, fencing, and additional street elements, with less emphasis on the main entrance.
